title: And Now a Word from Our Sponsor
original_title: And Now a Word from Our Sponsor
overview: Adan Kundle, CEO of a major advertising agency, is discovered unconscious in front of a wall of TVs. When he wakes in the hospital, Adan can only communicate through advertising slogans.
